name: Chicken and Olive Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the pan and fry until they are golden brown on all sides.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and set it aside. Reduce the heat to low.
4. In the same pan, add the chopped onions and garlic. Cook until the onions become translucent and soft.
5. Add the zucchini and tomatoes to the pan. Stir in oregano and thyme.
6. Continue cooking for a few minutes until some of the excess liquid has reduced.
7. Return the chicken to the pan and season with salt and pepper as desired.
8. Cover the pan and cook on low heat for approximately 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
9. About 10 minutes before the chicken is fully cooked, add the rinsed green olives to the pan. Stir well to combine.
10. Cook the casserole for an additional 10 minutes with the olives included.
11. Serve the casserole over white rice.
Source: The Times-Picayune, NOLA. MM Waldine Van Geffen vghc42a.
